channel.title: High-Profile Athlete Injury Report
channel.description: Daily-updated feed of high-profile athlete injuries across NFL, NBA, WNBA, MLB, NHL, top soccer leagues, tennis, golf, F1, boxing/UFC, cricket, Olympic sports, and NCAA D1.

item.title: Kamilla Cardoso (Basketball) — Right knee injury
item.description: Kamilla Cardoso (Chicago Sky (WNBA)) — Right knee injury. Location: Chicago, Illinois. League: WNBA. Expected duration: Listed questionable for the Sky's July 16 game vs. the Seattle Storm; in danger of missing her first game of the season. Financial impact: $706 ($706 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$85,873 per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 3 days out) [questionable status, day-to-day default]). Team impact: Would be the first missed game of the season for the No. 3 overall 2024 pick if she sits; Elizabeth Williams poised for a spot start.

item.title: Junior Caminero (Baseball) — Right hand injury after being hit by a pitch during the 2026 All-Star Game; X-rays came back negative
item.description: Junior Caminero (Tampa Bay Rays (MLB)) — Right hand injury after being hit by a pitch during the 2026 All-Star Game; X-rays came back negative. Location: St. Petersburg, Florida. League: MLB. Expected duration: Day-to-day; no injured list move reported following negative X-rays. Financial impact: $6,532 ($6,532 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$794,800 per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 3 days out)). Team impact: Rays monitor their All-Star third baseman's availability for the second half after the All-Star Game scare.

item.title: Trey Alexander (Basketball) — Rib contusion sustained driving to the basket; taken off the court on a stretcher
item.description: Trey Alexander (Utah Jazz (NBA) — Las Vegas Summer League) — Rib contusion sustained driving to the basket; taken off the court on a stretcher. Location: Salt Lake City, Utah (team); Las Vegas, Nevada (Summer League site). League: NBA Summer League. Expected duration: Not specified in available reporting; team confirmed rib contusion diagnosis a day after the injury. Financial impact: $5,579 ($5,579 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$678,882 (two-way) per Hoops Rumors ÷ 365 × 3 days out) [assumption: no timeline given, day-to-day default]). Team impact: Jazz lose a newly-signed two-way guard for Summer League evaluation reps after a scary stretcher exit.

item.title: William Saliba (Soccer) — Recurrence of a back issue carried since Arsenal's Champions League final; forced off around the 29th minute of France's World Cup semifinal loss to Spain
item.description: William Saliba (Arsenal (Premier League) / France National Team (2026 FIFA World Cup)) — Recurrence of a back issue carried since Arsenal's Champions League final; forced off around the 29th minute of France's World Cup semifinal loss to Spain. Location: London, England. League: International Soccer. Expected duration: No diagnosis or return timeline disclosed; had been managing the issue throughout the World Cup. Financial impact: N/A (Not applicable — no fixed salary information available for this national-team context). Team impact: Compounds France's growing injury list in a 0-2 semifinal defeat; replaced by Crystal Palace's Maxence Lacroix, with Arsenal also monitoring the issue heading into preseason.

item.title: Chris Harper (Cycling) — Serious injury to the thumb of his left hand, sustained in a crash on the descent of the Puy Mary during stage 10 (same corner where Tom Pidcock and Matteo Jorgenson also crashed); underwent surgery
item.description: Chris Harper (Q36.5 Pro Cycling Team (Tour de France) — Australia) — Serious injury to the thumb of his left hand, sustained in a crash on the descent of the Puy Mary during stage 10 (same corner where Tom Pidcock and Matteo Jorgenson also crashed); underwent surgery. Location: Zurich, Switzerland (team HQ). League: UCI ProTeam / Tour de France. Expected duration: Unable to start stage 11; withdrew from the Tour de France; recovery timeline not specified in available reporting. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed in available reporting — no specific prize money forfeiture figure found Potential prize money at stake (ceiling, not a claim of what the athlete would have won): €2,302,800 (~$2.6M) total tournament prize purse for the 2026 Tour de France (per Velo/Outside Online).). Team impact: Q36.5 Pro Cycling Team loses a rider mid-Tour after a dangerous descent that felled multiple riders.

item.title: Kierstan Bell (Basketball) — Right leg injury (specific diagnosis not disclosed in available reporting)
item.description: Kierstan Bell (Las Vegas Aces (WNBA)) — Right leg injury (specific diagnosis not disclosed in available reporting). Location: Las Vegas, Nevada. League: WNBA. Expected duration: Ruled out for the Aces' July 13 game vs. the Indiana Fever; no return timeline given. Financial impact: $2,281 ($2,281 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$277,500 per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 3 days out) [assumption: single-game absence, no timeline, day-to-day default]). Team impact: Aces without a rotation forward who had recently moved into the starting lineup, adding to the team's list of unavailable players.

item.title: Izaiyah Nelson (Basketball) — Ankle fracture, sustained landing awkwardly after a chase-down block attempt
item.description: Izaiyah Nelson (Orlando Magic (NBA Summer League)) — Ankle fracture, sustained landing awkwardly after a chase-down block attempt. Location: Orlando, Florida. League: NBA Summer League. Expected duration: Will undergo surgery; ruled out for the remainder of Summer League. Financial impact: $13,020 ($13,020 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$678,882 (two-way) per Hoops Rumors ÷ 365 × 7 days out) [assumption: ruled out for remainder of NBA Summer League (~July 13-20); true post-surgery recovery likely longer but not specified]). Team impact: Magic lose their second-round pick's Summer League evaluation window.

item.title: Ace Bailey (Basketball) — Recurring back spasms, first flared up during Salt Lake City Summer League and recurred in Las Vegas
item.description: Ace Bailey (Utah Jazz (NBA Summer League)) — Recurring back spasms, first flared up during Salt Lake City Summer League and recurred in Las Vegas. Location: Salt Lake City, Utah. League: NBA Summer League. Expected duration: Did not return after halftime on July 13 vs. Portland; held out of the July 14 game vs. Chicago as the Jazz prioritize long-term health. Financial impact: $78,272 ($78,272 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$9.52M per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 3 days out) [assumption: held out as precaution, no formal diagnosis/timeline, day-to-day default]). Team impact: Jazz hold their 2025 lottery pick out of further Summer League action out of caution.

item.title: Kevin Holland (Mixed Martial Arts) — Undisclosed injury
item.description: Kevin Holland (UFC) — Undisclosed injury. Location: N/A — individual fighter, not tied to a team location. League: UFC. Expected duration: Pulled from his scheduled bout with Jacobe Smith at UFC Oklahoma City (July 18); bout removed from the card. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed in available reporting — no specific prize money forfeiture figure found). Team impact: Not disclosed in available reporting.

item.title: Veronica Hardy (Mixed Martial Arts) — Undisclosed injury
item.description: Veronica Hardy (UFC) — Undisclosed injury. Location: N/A — individual fighter, not tied to a team location. League: UFC. Expected duration: Pulled from her flyweight bout with Dione Barbosa at UFC Oklahoma City (July 18); replaced by Anna Melisano. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed in available reporting — no specific prize money forfeiture figure found). Team impact: Not disclosed in available reporting.

item.title: Max Whitlock (Gymnastics) — Hand injury, sustained in training
item.description: Max Whitlock (Team England (Commonwealth Games) / British Gymnastics) — Hand injury, sustained in training. Location: England. League: Commonwealth Games / British Gymnastics. Expected duration: Withdrew from the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games (July 23-Aug 2), announced 10 days before the Games began. Financial impact: N/A (Not applicable — no fixed salary information available for this national-team context). Team impact: Removes the three-time Olympic and 10-time Commonwealth Games medalist pommel horse specialist from Team England's squad.

item.title: Louis Oosthuizen (Golf) — Back injury
item.description: Louis Oosthuizen (PGA Tour / LIV Golf) — Back injury. Location: N/A — individual tour athlete, no fixed team location. League: PGA Tour / LIV Golf. Expected duration: Withdrew from The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale; also pulled out of next week's LIV Golf event at JCB Golf & Country Club. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed in available reporting — no specific prize money forfeiture figure found Potential prize money at stake (ceiling, not a claim of what the athlete would have won): $17.75M total tournament prize purse for the 2026 Open Championship at Royal Birkdale (per Forbes/PGA Tour).). Team impact: Removes the 2010 Open champion from the 156-man field; Aldrich Potgieter promoted as first alternate.

item.title: Alex Mitchell (Rugby Union) — Hamstring injury, sustained 9 minutes after coming on as a second-half replacement vs. Fiji; his third hamstring injury of the season
item.description: Alex Mitchell (England national team / British & Irish Lions) — Hamstring injury, sustained 9 minutes after coming on as a second-half replacement vs. Fiji; his third hamstring injury of the season. Location: England. League: Rugby Union (Nations Championship / Lions). Expected duration: Ruled out of England's final Nations Championship match against Argentina in Santiago del Estero. Financial impact: N/A (Not applicable — no fixed salary information available for this national-team context). Team impact: England loses its first-choice scrum-half for the climax of the July tour.

item.title: Leon Marchand (Swimming) — Right adductor muscle injury, felt during the 200m breaststroke heats; suspected lesion, though initial ultrasound/MRI showed no major abnormality
item.description: Leon Marchand (France national team (Swimming)) — Right adductor muscle injury, felt during the 200m breaststroke heats; suspected lesion, though initial ultrasound/MRI showed no major abnormality. Location: France. League: International Swimming (national federation). Expected duration: Withdrew from the final three days of the French Championships to continue treatment. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed in available reporting — no specific prize money forfeiture figure found). Team impact: His place at the European Aquatics Championships Paris 2026 (Aug 10-16) is not in doubt, as he has already qualified in one event.

item.title: Damian Penaud (Rugby Union) — Calf injury
item.description: Damian Penaud (France national team (Rugby Union)) — Calf injury. Location: France. League: Rugby Union (Nations Championship). Expected duration: Ruled out of France's remaining Nations Championship matches vs. Australia (July 13, Brisbane) and Japan (July 18, Tokyo). Financial impact: N/A (Not applicable — no fixed salary information available for this national-team context). Team impact: France loses a starting winger for the rest of its Nations Championship campaign.

item.title: Caleb Delany (Rugby Union) — Concussion, sustained in the semi-final
item.description: Caleb Delany (Hurricanes (Super Rugby Pacific)) — Concussion, sustained in the semi-final. Location: Wellington, New Zealand. League: Super Rugby Pacific. Expected duration: Availability for the Super Rugby Pacific Grand Final uncertain pending return-to-play protocols. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed — individual Super Rugby Pacific player salaries are confidential (New Zealand Rugby publishes only general pay-band ranges, not player-specific figures)). Team impact: Hurricanes risk being without a forward for the Grand Final.

item.title: Drew Wild (Rugby Union) — Shoulder injury
item.description: Drew Wild (Chiefs (Super Rugby Pacific)) — Shoulder injury. Location: Hamilton, New Zealand. League: Super Rugby Pacific. Expected duration: Listed as a doubt for the Super Rugby Pacific Grand Final despite hopes of being available. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed — individual Super Rugby Pacific player salaries are confidential (New Zealand Rugby publishes only general pay-band ranges, not player-specific figures)). Team impact: Chiefs risk being without a forward for the Grand Final.

item.title: Carlos Rodón (Baseball) — Left elbow inflammation
item.description: Carlos Rodón (New York Yankees (MLB)) — Left elbow inflammation. Location: New York, New York (Bronx). League: MLB. Expected duration: Resumed throwing daily as of July 13; possible late-July return to the rotation. Financial impact: $1,109,589 ($1,109,589 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$27M per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 15 days out) [estimate: ~15 days from July 13 to a "late July" return target]). Team impact: Yankees without a rotation starter for a portion of the stretch run, though a return is targeted before the end of the month.

item.title: Jake Fraley (Baseball) — Setback related to prior sports hernia surgery; renewed groin discomfort during a rehab assignment at Triple-A Durham
item.description: Jake Fraley (Tampa Bay Rays (MLB)) — Setback related to prior sports hernia surgery; renewed groin discomfort during a rehab assignment at Triple-A Durham. Location: St. Petersburg, Florida. League: MLB. Expected duration: Pulled from his rehab assignment; faces further evaluation before a return timeline is set, having already been out since May with the hernia. Financial impact: $41,096 ($41,096 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$3.0M per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 5 days out) [undetermined additional recovery time following the rehab setback]). Team impact: Rays' return timeline for their outfielder is pushed back again, prolonging an IL stint that began in May.

item.title: Cameron Brink (Basketball) — Left ankle sprain, suffered turning her ankle in a loss to the Golden State Valkyries
item.description: Cameron Brink (Los Angeles Sparks (WNBA)) — Left ankle sprain, suffered turning her ankle in a loss to the Golden State Valkyries. Location: Los Angeles, California. League: WNBA. Expected duration: Expected out at least two weeks, to be reevaluated after that; coach indicated it could extend longer. Financial impact: $18,942 ($18,942 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$493,851 per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 14 days out) [expected out at least two weeks]). Team impact: Sparks lose their starting forward for at least two weeks; unrelated to her prior knee issues.

item.title: Mike Yastrzemski (Baseball) — Left elbow inflammation
item.description: Mike Yastrzemski (Atlanta Braves (MLB)) — Left elbow inflammation. Location: Atlanta (Cumberland), Georgia. League: MLB. Expected duration: Placed on the 10-day injured list. Financial impact: $246,575 ($246,575 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$9M per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 10 days out)). Team impact: Braves lose an outfield bat for at least 10 days.

item.title: Kyle Harrison (Baseball) — Left forearm tightness
item.description: Kyle Harrison (Milwaukee Brewers (MLB)) — Left forearm tightness. Location: Milwaukee, Wisconsin. League: MLB. Expected duration: Placed on the 15-day injured list, retroactive to July 9. Financial impact: $32,305 ($32,305 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$786,100 per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 15 days out)). Team impact: Brewers lose a starting pitching option for at least 15 days.

item.title: Jhonattan Vegas (Golf) — Shoulder issue
item.description: Jhonattan Vegas (PGA Tour) — Shoulder issue. Location: N/A — individual tour athlete, no fixed team location. League: PGA Tour. Expected duration: Withdrew from the John Deere Classic and the Genesis Scottish Open. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed in available reporting — no specific prize money forfeiture figure found Potential prize money at stake (ceiling, not a claim of what the athlete would have won): $8.8M total tournament prize purse for the 2026 John Deere Classic (per Golf Channel).). Team impact: Not disclosed in available reporting.

item.title: Mattia Bellucci (Tennis) — Knee issue, sustained during a Wimbledon warm-up
item.description: Mattia Bellucci (ATP Tour) — Knee issue, sustained during a Wimbledon warm-up. Location: N/A — individual tour athlete, no fixed team location. League: ATP Tour. Expected duration: Withdrew from the Swiss Open Gstaad; had already missed Wimbledon because of the injury. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed in available reporting — no specific prize money forfeiture figure found Potential prize money at stake (ceiling, not a claim of what the athlete would have won): €612,620 total tournament prize purse for the 2026 EFG Swiss Open Gstaad (per Perfect Tennis).). Team impact: Not disclosed in available reporting.

item.title: Maya Joint (Tennis) — Back injury, described as a season-long issue
item.description: Maya Joint (WTA Tour) — Back injury, described as a season-long issue. Location: N/A — individual tour athlete, no fixed team location. League: WTA Tour. Expected duration: Withdrew from WTA Athens to rest ahead of the second half of the season. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed in available reporting — no specific prize money forfeiture figure found Potential prize money at stake (ceiling, not a claim of what the athlete would have won): $283,347 total tournament prize purse for the 2026 Athens Open (WTA 250) (per Perfect Tennis).). Team impact: Not disclosed in available reporting.

item.title: Drew Baiera (Soccer) — Ruptured ACL, left knee
item.description: Drew Baiera (New York City FC (MLS)) — Ruptured ACL, left knee. Location: New York (Bronx), New York. League: MLS. Expected duration: Will undergo surgery; out for an extended rehabilitation period. Financial impact: $1,553 ($1,553 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$113,400 per Capology ÷ 365 × 5 days out; no specific recovery timeline disclosed, conservative 5-day default used)). Team impact: NYCFC loses a defender for the remainder of the season.

item.title: Jordan Morris (Soccer) — ACL injury, sustained while on loan at Swansea City
item.description: Jordan Morris (Seattle Sounders (MLS) / U.S. men's national team) — ACL injury, sustained while on loan at Swansea City. Location: Seattle, Washington. League: MLS. Expected duration: Returning to the U.S. for surgery with Dr. Bert Mandelbaum; out for an extended period. Financial impact: $30,822 ($30,822 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$2.25M per Capology ÷ 365 × 5 days out; no specific recovery timeline disclosed, conservative 5-day default used)). Team impact: Sounders and USMNT lose a veteran forward for an extended stretch.

item.title: Nikola Petkovic (Soccer) — ACL reconstruction surgery
item.description: Nikola Petkovic (Seattle Sounders (MLS)) — ACL reconstruction surgery. Location: Seattle, Washington. League: MLS. Expected duration: Ruled out for the remainder of the 2026 season. Financial impact: $64,658 ($64,658 prorated sunk cost (annual salary cap hit ~$200,000 per Capology ÷ 365 × 118 days out; days out estimated from date reported to 2026 MLS regular season end ~Nov 7)). Team impact: Sounders lose a midfielder for the rest of the season.

item.title: Emerson Hancock (Baseball) — Right middle finger contusion; negative X-rays
item.description: Emerson Hancock (Seattle Mariners (MLB)) — Right middle finger contusion; negative X-rays. Location: Seattle, Washington. League: MLB. Expected duration: Day-to-day after exiting his start on July 12. Financial impact: $6,520 ($6,520 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$793,300 per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 3 days out)). Team impact: Mariners monitor a rotation piece heading toward the All-Star break.

item.title: Will Wilson (Baseball) — Fractured left thumb
item.description: Will Wilson (Seattle Mariners (MLB)) — Fractured left thumb. Location: Seattle, Washington. League: MLB. Expected duration: Pulled from his rehab assignment due to pain; may require season-ending surgery. Financial impact: $166,685 ($166,685 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$780,000 per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 78 days out; possible season-ending surgery, days out estimated from date reported to MLB regular season end ~Sept 28)). Team impact: Mariners' infield depth option now faces a possible lost season.

item.title: Francisco Comesana (Tennis) — Undisclosed injury
item.description: Francisco Comesana (ATP Tour) — Undisclosed injury. Location: N/A — individual tour athlete, no fixed team location. League: ATP Tour. Expected duration: Withdrew from the Swiss Open Gstaad and a Challenger event in Germany. Financial impact: N/A (Not disclosed in available reporting — no specific prize money forfeiture figure found Potential prize money at stake (ceiling, not a claim of what the athlete would have won): €612,620 total tournament prize purse for the 2026 EFG Swiss Open Gstaad (per ATP Tour/Perfect Tennis).). Team impact: Not disclosed in available reporting.

item.title: Blaze Alexander (Baseball) — Non-displaced fracture in the left hand after being hit by a pitch from Royals reliever Lucas Erceg, sparking a benches-clearing incident
item.description: Blaze Alexander (Baltimore Orioles (MLB)) — Non-displaced fracture in the left hand after being hit by a pitch from Royals reliever Lucas Erceg, sparking a benches-clearing incident. Location: Baltimore, Maryland. League: MLB. Expected duration: Expected to miss at least a month; season could be over if surgery is required. Financial impact: $65,178 ($65,178 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$792,800 per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 30 days out) [estimate: 'at least a month' minimum]). Team impact: Orioles lose a middle infielder for at least a month, with a risk of a season-ending outcome pending further evaluation.

item.title: Zac Gallen (Baseball) — Right elbow inflammation
item.description: Zac Gallen (Arizona Diamondbacks (MLB)) — Right elbow inflammation. Location: Phoenix, Arizona. League: MLB. Expected duration: Placed on the 15-day injured list, retroactive to July 9. Financial impact: $905,205 ($905,205 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$22.025M per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 15 days out)). Team impact: Diamondbacks lose their staff ace for at least two turns through the rotation.

item.title: Satou Sabally (Basketball) — Concussion protocol after being elbowed in the face by Aces forward NaLyssa Smith while contesting a rebound; symptoms had delayed onset
item.description: Satou Sabally (New York Liberty (WNBA)) — Concussion protocol after being elbowed in the face by Aces forward NaLyssa Smith while contesting a rebound; symptoms had delayed onset. Location: Brooklyn, New York. League: WNBA. Expected duration: Downgraded from questionable to out; remains in concussion protocol with no return timeline given. Financial impact: $11,164 ($11,164 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$815K per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 5 days out) [assumption: concussion protocol with no return timeline, used 5-day undetermined default]). Team impact: Liberty without their All-Star forward for multiple games as she works through the NBA/WNBA-mandated concussion protocol; notable given she also missed time with a concussion in the 2025 WNBA Finals.

item.title: Angel Reese (Basketball) — Lower leg/ankle injury sustained falling under the basket late in a win over the Seattle Storm
item.description: Angel Reese (Atlanta Dream (WNBA)) — Lower leg/ankle injury sustained falling under the basket late in a win over the Seattle Storm. Location: Atlanta, Georgia. League: WNBA. Expected duration: Listed questionable for the Dream's game vs. the Portland Fire; no firm return timeline given. Financial impact: $2,882 ($2,882 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$350,692 per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 3 days out) [assumption: day-to-day questionable status]). Team impact: Puts a third-straight All-Star selection and Dream's first year with Reese (acquired in an offseason trade from Chicago) at risk of interruption during a stretch where the team is trying to build momentum after a five-game losing streak.

item.title: Brionna Jones (Basketball) — Meniscus tear in the right knee suffered in late January while playing overseas for USK Prague; underwent knee surgery at Emory Hospital
item.description: Brionna Jones (Atlanta Dream (WNBA)) — Meniscus tear in the right knee suffered in late January while playing overseas for USK Prague; underwent knee surgery at Emory Hospital. Location: Atlanta, Georgia. League: WNBA. Expected duration: Ruled out to begin the 2026 season and remains sidelined into mid-July; not yet cleared for 5-on-5 drills and has no firm return timetable, though the team says she is expected to make a full recovery. Financial impact: $153,425 ($153,425 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$1M per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 56 days out) [assumption: out since ~start of 2026 WNBA season (~May 16) through date reported (July 11), ~56 days]). Team impact: Four-time All-Star center has yet to play a game for the Dream this season, a significant frontcourt loss to start the year.

item.title: Leonie Fiebich (Basketball) — Left foot soreness
item.description: Leonie Fiebich (New York Liberty (WNBA)) — Left foot soreness. Location: Brooklyn, New York. League: WNBA. Expected duration: Ruled out for a second straight game, having missed her first game since May 25; no return timeline given. Financial impact: $4,021 ($4,021 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$293,510 per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 5 days out) [assumption: no return timeline, used 5-day undetermined default]). Team impact: Liberty forward sidelined for consecutive games amid a compressed schedule that includes a quick turnaround for a game in Toronto.

item.title: Johan Manzambi (Soccer) — Left-knee injury suffered in training on the eve of the Round of 16 match vs. Colombia
item.description: Johan Manzambi (Switzerland National Team (2026 FIFA World Cup)) — Left-knee injury suffered in training on the eve of the Round of 16 match vs. Colombia. Location: Switzerland. League: International Soccer. Expected duration: Missed the Round of 16 win over Colombia and ruled out of the quarterfinal vs. Argentina; no return timeline given. Financial impact: N/A (Not applicable — no fixed salary information available for this national-team context). Team impact: Major blow to Switzerland's attack: with Manzambi on the pitch during the group stage the team averaged 3.6 goals per 90 minutes (3 goals, 2 assists for him in 200 minutes); without him, Switzerland have scored just once and averaged 1.4 xG per 90 over 280 minutes.

item.title: Marc Guehi (Soccer) — Hamstring strain picked up in England's Round of 16 win over Mexico
item.description: Marc Guehi (England National Team (2026 FIFA World Cup)) — Hamstring strain picked up in England's Round of 16 win over Mexico. Location: England. League: International Soccer. Expected duration: Missed a training session in Kansas City but returned to training Friday and was confirmed available for the quarterfinal vs. Norway. Financial impact: N/A (Not applicable — no fixed salary information available for this national-team context). Team impact: Created a late fitness scare for England's back line ahead of the quarterfinal, with Newcastle's Dan Burn on standby to deputize had Guehi been unavailable.

item.title: Nick Kurtz (Baseball) — Right thumb capsule sprain
item.description: Nick Kurtz (Athletics (MLB)) — Right thumb capsule sprain. Location: West Sacramento, California (Sutter Health Park; relocating to Las Vegas). League: MLB. Expected duration: Placed on the 10-day injured list, retroactive to July 10. Financial impact: $21,507 ($21,507 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$785K per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 10 days out) [10-day injured list stint]). Team impact: Keeps the 2025 AL Rookie of the Year and scheduled AL All-Star starting first baseman (.266, 20 HR, 66 RBI, MLB-leading 76 walks) out of the July 14 All-Star Game in Philadelphia; catcher Brian Serven recalled from Triple-A in a corresponding move.

item.title: Nick Lodolo (Baseball) — Blister on the left index finger (throwing hand); a recurring issue, his fourth stint on the IL for blisters dating back to 2024
item.description: Nick Lodolo (Cincinnati Reds (MLB)) — Blister on the left index finger (throwing hand); a recurring issue, his fourth stint on the IL for blisters dating back to 2024. Location: Cincinnati, Ohio. League: MLB. Expected duration: Placed on the 15-day injured list; eligible to return July 27, though it could take longer depending on severity. Financial impact: $194,178 ($194,178 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$4.725M per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 15 days out) [15-day injured list stint]). Team impact: Reds turn to Rhett Lowder to fill Lodolo's rotation spot.

item.title: Bo Bichette (Baseball) — General leg soreness and right ankle soreness, aggravated by fouling balls off his legs during a series in Atlanta
item.description: Bo Bichette (New York Mets (MLB)) — General leg soreness and right ankle soreness, aggravated by fouling balls off his legs during a series in Atlanta. Location: Queens (Flushing), New York. League: MLB. Expected duration: Held out of the lineup for a second straight game and available only off the bench; expected to use the following day and the All-Star break for a full reset rather than go on the injured list. Financial impact: $345,205 ($345,205 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$42M (contract AAV) per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 3 days out) [assumption: day-to-day, not placed on IL, used 3-day estimate]). Team impact: Mets manage his workload during a productive stretch (.320 avg, .788 OPS over his last 25 games) heading into the All-Star break.

item.title: Conor McGregor (Mixed Martial Arts) — Suspected torn ACL in the right knee, sustained throwing a kick just 69 seconds into his UFC 329 return bout; official diagnosis pending further medical evaluation
item.description: Conor McGregor (UFC) — Suspected torn ACL in the right knee, sustained throwing a kick just 69 seconds into his UFC 329 return bout; official diagnosis pending further medical evaluation. Location: N/A — individual fighter, not tied to a team location. League: UFC. Expected duration: Fight stopped by the referee at 1:09 of round one; no recovery timeline given pending formal diagnosis. Financial impact: N/A (Not applicable — injury occurred during a completed, paid bout (referee stoppage), not a withdrawal from a future event, so no prize money was forfeited). Team impact: Ends McGregor's much-hyped comeback fight against Max Holloway almost immediately and casts doubt on any near-term return to competition.

item.title: Ezi Magbegor (Basketball) — Facial fracture
item.description: Ezi Magbegor (Seattle Storm (WNBA)) — Facial fracture. Location: Seattle, Washington. League: WNBA. Expected duration: Ruled out of the Storm's game vs. the Washington Mystics; to be reevaluated in the next couple of weeks. Financial impact: $47,945 ($47,945 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$1.25M per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 14 days out) [assumption: 'reevaluated in the next couple of weeks' = 2 weeks]). Team impact: Storm without their starting center/forward for at least the near term.

item.title: Konnor Griffin (Baseball) — Torn tendon (sagittal band) in the left ring finger, sustained diving for a ball; initially placed on the 10-day IL and now transferred to the 60-day IL
item.description: Konnor Griffin (Pittsburgh Pirates (MLB)) — Torn tendon (sagittal band) in the left ring finger, sustained diving for a ball; initially placed on the 10-day IL and now transferred to the 60-day IL. Location: Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. League: MLB. Expected duration: 8-10 week recovery timeline; ineligible to return until at least September 4; team opted for a non-operative approach, splinting the hand for about six weeks before resuming baseball activities. Financial impact: $172,603 ($172,603 prorated sunk cost (annual salary ~$1M base salary per Spotrac ÷ 365 × 63 days out) [8-10 week recovery timeline, used midpoint of 9 weeks = 63 days; excludes one-time signing bonus from prorated base]). Team impact: Pirates lose their rookie starting shortstop (the No. 1 overall pick in the 2024 draft) for an extended stretch, his second significant injury of the season after an earlier forearm strain.
